experiences.title: Site Reliability Engineer
highlights: Architecture and maintenance of the collect, processing and serving infrastructure for the data team on **GCP**, handling **~22k events/sec** in our main entry point. 100% managed via **Terraform**, solution include a **multi-regional GKE** with **Istio**, message queue system (**Pub/Sub**), distributed streaming pipeline (**Dataflow**) and data warehouse (**BigQuery**)
Implement and maintain our internal observability infrastructure, with **Grafana**, **Loki**, **Cortex** and **Alloy** agents, using **Open Telemetry** protocol to avoid vendor lock-in
Develop a **streaming pipeline** to generate **telemetry** from access logs for each of our customer to compute their **SLAs**
Fully rework the **VPC**, **network** implementation and **IaC code** to be future-proof and improve reliability, maintainability and our velocity for new features
Develop various CLI (**golang**) for internal usage, including Terraform wrapper with multiple features, **markdown-to-confluence** sync and infrastructure **documentation auto-generation**
Implement easy workflow to generate **infrastructure changelog** for internal communication
Write **ADRs** to encourage constructive discussions before implementation, and also improve our onboarding process

Industrialize our process, and offer **better autonomy** to the feature teams over the infrastructure with **Terraform modules**, **documentations**, **CI pipelines** and **safeguards** to implement their needs without relying on the infrastructure team

experiences.title: DevOps
highlights: Took back the control of the **AWS** infrastructure from our provider (Oxalide)
Architected and deployed our second generation infrastructure for our collect pipeline (**~5k events/sec**), using **GCP** and **Terraform**
Implemented **Grafana** as dashboard and **monitoring** solution (replacing Datadog)
Implemented **FinOps strategy** and best practices to control and reduced our infrastructure cost, resulting in **$1+ million** cost saving per year

experiences.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Developed and maintained the **RESTful API** with the **Symfony** framework used by our customers to use our CRO platform
Popularized **best practices** and facilitated contributions within the team (**OpenAPI**, **Postman**, **PHP Unit**, **Docker**)

experiences.title: Symfony Developer
highlights: Developed web applications using standard web frameworks such as **Symfony** or **Zend** for our clients

experiences.title: Web Developer
highlights: Developed various kinds of websites and plugins using/for **Drupal** CMS solution, from basic blog to complex timetracking web app

experiences.title: System Administrator
highlights: Installed and maintained reconditioned **hardware/software** from SUN ecosystem (**Unix** / **Solaris**) for our customers. Maintenance included hardware replacement, **RAID** and **zone** configuration
